description: A Conflict-room encounter (infinite_stacks.md S14/S24.3) mid-round, in the wire shape stacks-conflict posted 17:15 wave-3 (EARLY DRAFT, board task #9 -- final dict confirmed once stacks_projections.py lands): project() gains a top-level 'conflict' key parallel to 'puzzles', {room_id: {...}}. This fixture is that one room's entry. Enemy intent and the S12.5 check receipt are NOT on this projection -- core/store.js folds them client-side from the raw combat/events.py event dicts embedded in conflict_turn_resolved's payload.combat_events (already-shipped, accepted wave-2 shapes); last_intent_telegraph here is this projection's own single-most-recent fallback for a fresh reconnect with nothing folded yet.

last_intent_telegraph.telegraph_text: The goblin marks the reference shelf it plans to set alight next round.
last_intent_telegraph.accessible_text: Enemy intent: the Shelf-Lighter Goblin is about to ignite the reference shelf next round.
last_intent_telegraph.counterplay: Douse the shelf or force the goblin to move before its next turn.
